## Checklist

<!-- Please check the boxes below before submitting your Pull Request. -->

- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) guidelines (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`).
- [ ] I have modified `asn.json` appropriately (if adding or removing an ASN).
- [ ] I have **not** manually committed changes to `vpn-blocklist.txt` or `individual_blocklists/` (unless editing the generation scripts).
- [ ] (If applicable) I have tested my changes locally by running `./scripts/build-blocklist.sh` and `./scripts/build-crowdsec.sh`.
